column1: Ridgeview Secondary School, Buncombe County Schools
Role: Head coach, Ridgeview Rec Men's League (ages 25 to 40)
Practice: Thursday evenings 6:30 to 8:00 PM, Ridgeview gym
Games: Saturday afternoons 2:00 PM, most Saturdays through February
Home/Away: Home games at Ridgeview gym, away games at city rec centers
Neil handles Owen drop-off and Hazel pickup on all clinic days (T/W/Th) unless on coaching duty.
Brian covers mornings on his off days (Mon/Fri usually) when she is not on call.
During basketball season Nov through Jan, Thursdays 6:30 to 8 PM Neil is not available for kids.
Brian flags those Thursday nights as potential conflict with on-call shifts.
Neil won the recreational league championship January 2026. Brian made it to the final game.
